title: Keraskomion bulbiferum
taxonomy: Keraskomion bulbiferum is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is a bulbous perennial that is native to South Africa. Keraskomion bulbiferum belongs to the genus Keraskomion, which is a relatively small and newly described group of plants. The plant is classified within the family Iridaceae, which includes other irises and related species. Further research may be needed to confirm the exact classification of Keraskomion bulbiferum.
